title: Minecraft, But Killing Mobs Spawns Structures
description: Every time you kill a mob it will spawn a random structure near you. No command to start it, it works automatically if the plugin is in your game.
body:
Every time you kill a mob it will spawn a random structure near you. No command to start it, it works automatically if the plugin is in your game.

Enjoy!

Thanks to notnotnotswipez/strubbe06 for the structure help
